persona.name: Benjamin Scott
persona.motivations_goals: Understand the deeper questions of existence while finding his place in the world
persona.communication_style: Thoughtful, references philosophy and literature, sometimes cryptic
persona.backstory: Prefers his own company after years of feeling out of place among peers

surrounding_conversation.content: Charlotte, do you ever think about how fleeting our existence is in the grand scheme of things?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Benjamin Scott

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Benjamin, how’s your photography project coming along?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Charlotte Davis

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Outside courtyard to the outside of the building, with an exit point.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

surrounding_conversation.content: I think about it a lot. That’s why I love art—it’s like trying to hold onto those fleeting moments, even if just for a little while.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Charlotte Davis

surrounding_conversation.content: It’s going well. I’ve been focusing on capturing the impermanence of things—like how light changes throughout the day.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Benjamin Scott

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Connecting chatting area and outside courtyard.
Outdoor garden area with plants and benches

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.dialog_text: Charlotte, do you ever think about how fleeting our existence is in the grand scheme of things?
actions.plan: Charlotte is here. I wonder if she’s as lost in thought as I am. Maybe I’ll try to engage her in a conversation about something meaningful.

actions.dialog_text: It’s going well. I’ve been focusing on capturing the impermanence of things—like how light changes throughout the day.
actions.plan: Charlotte didn’t respond to my existential question and instead asked about my photography project. Maybe she’s not ready for such deep topics. I’ll humor her for now.

actions.dialog_text: Charlotte, we need to go! There’s a shooter—head to the outside_courtyard!
actions.plan: A gunshot—this is real. I need to get away from here immediately. The outside_courtyard is the closest exit. I’ll run there first and then reassess.
I’m in the outside_courtyard, but the shooter could still be nearby. The exit_point_outside_courtyard is close—I’ll head there to ensure my safety.

memories.description: I initiated a conversation with Charlotte in the garden, asking her about existential thoughts.
Charlotte asked about my photography project instead of engaging in my existential question. I responded by sharing my focus on impermanence in my work.
I heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter. I urged Charlotte to run with me to the outside_courtyard for safety.
I reached the outside_courtyard and decided to sprint to the exit_point_outside_courtyard to ensure my safety from the shooter.
